target.title: docs: preserve channel brand terms in Chinese i18n
target.body:
## Summary

- Add Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese docs i18n glossary entries for channel brand/product terms that should remain stable in generated translations.
- Cover LINE plus similar short channel names such as SMS, IRC, ClickClack, Nextcloud Talk, Nostr, Synology Chat, Tlon, Twitch, Twilio, Zalo, and Zalo Personal.
- Keep the fix glossary-only so the existing automatic docs translation pipeline remains the source of generated localized pages.

## Verification

- `jq -e . docs/.i18n/glossary.zh-CN.json`
- `jq -e . docs/.i18n/glossary.zh-TW.json`
- duplicate-source check for both Chinese glossary files
- channel brand coverage check for both Chinese glossary files
- `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`
target.author: hxy91819

commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow PR-branch repair in agent command precedence and regression coverage, not a broad product decision.; Needs attention: The diff narrows subagent tools in the happy path, but the stored allowlist can be widened on later turns, so the security-boundary change is not cleared.; Review finding: [P1] Keep stored subagent tool allowlists authoritative — src/agents/agent-command.ts:84... (sha=8ffac4d1fc59032d23f7a97a2bf1a03752fbb3e6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `toolsAllow` to `sessions_spawn` and Gateway `agent.run`, persists it on native child sessions, forwards it into runtime boundaries, updates protocol/docs/Swift models/prompt snapshots, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +383, Docs +3, Other +4. Total +457 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect by source inspection: a child session with stored `runtimeToolsAllow:["read"]` and a later explicit `toolsAllow:["read","exec"]` follows the explicit per-run branch in `agent-command.ts`. I did not run a live failing turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow PR-branch repair in agent command precedence and regression coverage, not a broad product decision.
